subcodes.first_line: O true friend! Though my fingers tremble from the weakness induced by travel, yet have I undertaken to write [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی اصابع از ضعف سفر پرارتعاش است باوجود این بتحریر پرداختم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
